{{Quote|Ah, I've heard of you! You're not a bad pilot from what I understand. What can the CorSec do for you?|Sergeant Rhea|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Rhea''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian Security Force]] [[Police officer/Legends|officer]], stationed in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]]. He was responsible for training CorSec [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and assigning duty missions to them.

==Behind the scenes==
Sergeant Rhea was a NPC in [[Sony]] Online Entertainment's MMORPG ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. Players who decided to join the neutral CorSec Squadron had to talk to Rhea to get mission assignments and learn new pilot skills.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
